use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH ALOPECIA AREATA

indications.text:
LEQSELVI™ is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with severe alopecia areata.
Limitations of Use
LEQSELVI is not recommended for use in combination with other JAK inhibitors, biologic
immunomodulators, cyclosporine, or other potent immunosuppressants.
